summary: EXP-234 resolves ISS-1456 (P7 implicit linear-coverage assumption) by naming the linear-coverage form as a first-order approximation for the standard model (rigorous Sq physics enters coverage through the ionospheric-conductivity integral with altitude and local-time structure), adopting it symmetrically so nonlinear-coverage effects drift both residuals in parallel. The geographic-vs-magnetic-latitude fingerprint is preserved and the residual no longer quietly biases toward the dome's formulation.
